orchestration_mode.durable_memory: GitHub exact refs, worker status files, current state and append-only orchestration event log
orchestration_mode.rule: Never rely on chat memory alone; verify and record exact refs before decisions
orchestration_mode.owner_speed_directive: Build one bounded Codex milestone at a time. Present the next exact scope to the Owner before creating or dispatching its contract. No routine extra audit loop.
orchestration_mode.limit_awareness: Local worker execution is not observable until status/branch/head evidence is pushed

c0_4f_a.title: Runtime layer separation and essential Boundary strokes
c0_4f_a.findings: No BLOCKER, HIGH, MEDIUM or LOW product finding; accepted known Organism fallback and 50+ Cell limitation

architecture.connection_rule: Connection is not a seventh Organism target; V1 uses straight centre-to-centre lines with semantic meaning and visual appearance separately editable
architecture.annotation_rule: Annotation Card is standalone markup, not Cell content and not the existing label-mode AnnotationWidget

bottom_dock.rail_rule: One reusable contextual rail opens above the active circular launcher; only one rail open at once

sequential_milestones.title: Canvas Shell, Bottom Dock and Shared Contextual Rails

sequential_milestones.title: Inspector Context, Target Rail and Dedicated Organism Settings Widgets

Markup Rail, Annotation Card and Annotation Studio

dispatch_rule.before_each_milestone: Assistant presents exact visible changes, moves/removals, exclusions, branch and acceptance checks; Owner may add changes
dispatch_rule.authorization: Only explicit Owner GO creates the final contract and Codex launch prompt
dispatch_rule.completion: Codex stops at WAITING_REVIEW; Assistant verifies GitHub evidence; Owner explicitly approves merge or correction
dispatch_rule.next_milestone: Present only after current milestone is reviewed and merged
dispatch_rule.audit: No separate audit by default unless a BLOCKER/HIGH-risk contradiction appears

superseded_or_absorbed_plans.reason: Owner requires one bounded milestone at a time with review and additions before each Codex dispatch

Verify main equals the audited feature head
Assistant presents M1 exact scope to Owner; no dispatch yet
Owner adds/removes requirements and says GO CODEX M1

Codex implements M1 on feature/c0-m1-canvas-shell-context-rails and stops at WAITING_REVIEW

After M1 merge, Assistant presents M2 before any dispatch
Repeat the same cycle through M6
protected: main without explicit Owner merge approval
Master Graph/store as sole data source
audit branches must never be merged
research branches must never be merged wholesale into main
Selection UI must never persist or export
Connection semantic meaning must remain separate from visual line appearance
Annotation Card must remain standalone markup rather than Cell appearance/content
No later milestone may be dispatched before Owner review and GO
known_limits: Organism non-solid Boundary styles truthfully fall back to solid
50+ Cell performance remains a known limitation
Known Vite chunk warning remains accepted
Curved/Bezier/orthogonal/animated connections are deferred beyond straight-line V1
Advanced Membrane geometry and motion remain performance-gated
Full premium marketplace/commercial material system remains deferred
